title: pelargonium × suffusum
intro: Pelargonium × suffusum, also known as Red Leaf Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and combat infections, due to its high concentration of compounds like geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × suffusum include its potential to alleviate cold and flu symptoms, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent to soothe sore throats and coughs. Pelargonium × suffusum can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often blended with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
